creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: antoine
Date: Sat Dec  7 09:01:11 2013
New Revision: 335816
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335816

Log:
  - Update to 3.0.2
  - Stage support
  
  PR:		ports/184127
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (2 weeks)

Modified:
  head/archivers/pecl-rar/Makefile
  head/archivers/pecl-rar/distinfo

Modified: head/archivers/pecl-rar/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/archivers/pecl-rar/Makefile	Sat Dec  7 09:01:00 2013	(r335815)
+++ head/archivers/pecl-rar/Makefile	Sat Dec  7 09:01:11 2013	(r335816)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rar
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.1
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.2
 CATEGORIES=	archivers pear
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pecl.php.net/get/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pecl-
@@ -14,7 +14,6 @@ COMMENT=	PECL extension to create and re
 
 LICENSE=	PHP301
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 USE_PHP=	spl
 USE_PHPEXT=	yes
 USE_PHP_BUILD=	yes

Modified: head/archivers/pecl-rar/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/archivers/pecl-rar/distinfo	Sat Dec  7 09:01:00 2013	(r335815)
+++ head/archivers/pecl-rar/distinfo	Sat Dec  7 09:01:11 2013	(r335816)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (PECL/rar-3.0.1.tgz) = 256638
+SHA256 (PECL/rar-3.0.2.tgz) = 37841aea7c91afe2a250afc28bcdc7d6807f8aa3a2411a1c121f17252f66f21d
+SIZE (PECL/rar-3.0.2.tgz) = 257787
